budgets_note: Budgets RATIFIED UNCHANGED at v3-M5 (2026-07-10): one full-length e4_arm_p calibration sequence (seed 37, 6 tasks, glm-5.2 thinking-on, z.ai paas/v4 route direct-zhipu-api-key) observed max 7/27 turns, 178400/490000 tokens, 2/12 verifications, $0.8175/$5 — no wall hit, the freeze rule's fits-with-headroom branch applies. Values remain the v2 v0.3 set (27 turns / 12 verifications / 490000 tokens / $5 cap), read from the frozen v2 file; version 0.1 -> 0.2 marks this ratification event. Model-id pin: these budgets transfer to a v3-M6 evidence run only on the exact model id glm-5.2, thinking-ON, on this route; any other model or thinking configuration repeats the ratification. Provenance: docs/protocols/e4-v3-m5-calibration-manifest-20260710-001.json + docs/protocols/e4-v3-m5-reasoning-observability-20260710-001.json; notes docs/e4/E4V3-M5-BUDGET-CALIBRATION-NOTES.md. The ASK_PM and product-gate protocol texts are sealed via the code_twins over turn-protocol.ts and product-gate.ts. v2 v0.3 -> v0.4 / v3 v0.2 -> v0.3 (2026-07-11, Phase-0 learning boundary): budgets UNCHANGED; the boundary moved for the harness-feedback fixes found by the M6 adversarial review (openspec validate stderr passthrough, archive-abort hint passthrough, README capability-retirement section) — budgets remain ratified on glm-5.2 thinking-on per the v3-M5 event; the v3-M6 evidence manifests stamp the historical v2 2f78f534... / v3 aec35e3d... hashes (re-run that verdict against the archived files via git show 5ed1d87:<path>). v2 v0.4 -> v0.5 / v3 v0.3 -> v0.4 (2026-07-12, §5.7 Amendment 3 substrate naturalization): budgets UNCHANGED; the boundary moved because the fixture-migration verification showed 41/63 M6 + 9/13 learning false-confidence events were fully explained by undisclosed convention traps (naive pluralization, seed-fixture regeneration) — substrate_version is now procedural-rest-v2.1 (English pluralizer, seed-data carry-forward, ref-key cascade, PM-brief fixture_migration disclosure); the v2 code-twin set also gains the feedback-behavior modules (openspec/runner/gate/workspace/fake-provider) per the 2026-07-12 external-audit design inputs. Budgets remain ratified on glm-5.2 thinking-on per the v3-M5 event, but the substrate change SHOULD be re-checked by the pre-seal full-budget rename-free calibration rung before any evidence run. v3 v0.4 -> v0.5 (2026-07-12, v3-M7 gate commit, operator 'Proceed to all 3'): budgets UNCHANGED and remain ratified by the seed-144 pre-seal calibration rung (freeze-unchanged: max 12/27 turns, 183.8k/490k tokens, $0.63/$5 — docs/e4/E4V3-M7-PRECAL-NOTES.md); the v0.4->v0.5 delta is disclosure/instrument-only (one PM-brief line for add_entity 'starts with no records' + the sealed m7_evidence block {close_rate_guard_max_gap 0.15, scheduled_tasks_per_sequence 6}), with no budget-relevant surface — the carry of the ratification across this delta is a recorded judgment call. TOMBSTONE DISCLOSURE (external-audit design input 5, recorded at this seal): the workspace README's capability-retirement section (present in BOTH arms since the Phase-0 boundary ae4169d) teaches gold's canonical retirement shape (ADDED tombstone + REMOVED all prior requirements) as a shared-environment affordance; it does not leak gold's paths or data. v2 v0.5 -> v0.6 / v3 v0.5 -> v0.6 (2026-07-13, E5 P0-V rig repair, operator-ratified proposal-v2 §7 gate + PARKED.md design review): budgets UNCHANGED; the boundary moved for instrument-validity repairs only — (1) PATCH full-replace semantics disclosed in the workspace README and the PM brief (never reimplemented in gold); (2) false disclosures corrected: the brief's rename line no longer says 'everywhere' and now states stored ids/values are kept (fixture_migration fact added for renames; brief id e4-pm-brief-v2, determinacy table e4-request-determinacy-v2 with modify_endpoint method-form honestly underdetermined), and the modify_endpoint phrasing variant 2 'match the rest of the API' replaced by a direction-neutral truthful line in a v2-owned pool (substrate_version procedural-rest-v2.2; v1 substrate untouched; draw and PRNG consumption byte-identical); (3) glue-aware protocol feedback (delimiter_glued synthetic violations; sealed E1 parser byte-untouched); (4) lawful PARKED.md park primitive for leftover change directories (custody counts active dirs only; marker-only diffs keep the behavior-preserving affirmation; parks recorded as gate events); (5) off-topic close scoring (e4-on-topic-close-v1, referee-side only) recorded per done-close and reported in the probe disposition table; (6) root-cause-clustered burden (e4-root-cause-burden-v1) as a frozen secondary published alongside raw burden; (7) commitment-vs-gold scorer (e4-commitment-vs-gold-v1) built for probe P1.5. The v2 twin set gains substrate/v2/render.ts and v2/turns.ts; the v3 twin set gains on-topic.ts, root-cause.ts, commitment.ts. Budgets remain the ratified 27/12/490k/$5 set — no budget-relevant surface moved; E5 probes are calibration-class and re-examine appetite per probe. v2 v0.6 -> v0.7 / v3 v0.6 -> v0.7 (2026-07-13, E5 P0-V.1 review-repair boundary; operator-ratified Tiers 1-3 of docs/e5/E5-P0V-REVIEW-BACKLOG-v1.md with fix tracks V1a/V2a/V7a chosen by the operator): budgets UNCHANGED; the boundary moved for external-review repairs only — [V1a] off-topic close classifier v2 (e4-on-topic-close-v2: word-boundary matching, novel-occurrence rule over per-file task-start content, delta-spec channel scored by scenario-block predominance, and an unexpected_change_work flag on empty-delta closes scored diagnostically against prior-task subjects); [V2a] modify_endpoint phrasing variants 0/2 reworded direction-neutral in the v2-owned pool (substrate_version procedural-rest-v2.3; also removes the partial-update contradiction with the README created at P0-V); [V4] the PM brief's analytics line now pins the response shape {"count": <number of records>} (brief id e4-pm-brief-v3; ambiguity-inventory row 11 corrected); [V3] the workflow-protocol write-rule bullet now states the enforced rule (writes are allowed in any change directory; the task's work must end in a single active change); [S1] README parking section gains the marker-alone-suffices sentence (the create-inside-a-leftover corner is disclosed, not carved out); [S4] glue-feedback wording made conditional so narrated delimiters cannot read as commands; [D5] the learning report prints per-cluster item counts and labels the clustered readout family-collapsed; [V7a] add_entity draw-guard excludes ever-used entity names (the add->delete/rename->re-add tombstone-revival collision is now undrawable); [D6] substrate/prng.ts joins the v2 twin set; [D7] the v3 validator requires the P0-V sealed ids for constants version >= 0.6. CORRECTION OF RECORD (V8): the previous entry's sentence 'no budget-relevant surface moved' overreached — the glue-aware feedback exists precisely to recover the ~85 wasted turns and 3 stalls the E4 arc attributed to glued delimiters, i.e. nominal caps are retained but EFFECTIVE turn economics improved by design; the frozen caps stay valid as ceilings, and no cross-boundary turn-metric comparisons are permitted (probe templates must state the same exclusion). Budgets remain the ratified 27/12/490k/$5 set; E5 probes are calibration-class and re-examine appetite per probe.
